name: chi_squared
desc: A statistical test applied to categorical data to assess how likely it is that any observed difference between the sets occurred by chance.
label: Chi-Squared Test on Flower

y.label: Grouping Variable (dependent)
y.desc: A categorical variable. This variable is used to create the contingency table for the Chi-Squared test.

x.label: Covariates (independent)
x.desc: One or more categorical variables whose relationship with the dependent variable will be tested using the Chi-Squared test.
